T0100.title: Manual Data Extraction
T0100.definition: Derived from a term meaning “manual dialing,” this refers to the practice where downstream marketing or fraud rings make phone calls by hand to carry out malicious activities. The term appears in communications between downstream actors and midstream data brokers during illicit data transactions.
